guide.title: How to Find Sharing Link
guide.step1: Go to suno.com and find your favorite song or playlist.
guide.step2: Click share icon (arrow) on song card.
guide.step3: Copy the sharing link and paste it above.

YouTubeDownloader.speedNote: Download speeds may be slow due to YouTube limitations and proxy relay.
YouTubeDownloader.flowDesc: This tool runs locally in your browser and does not upload your media to our servers.
YouTubeDownloader.flowStep1: Analyze the YouTube link to discover available streams and subtitles.
YouTubeDownloader.flowStep2: Download the selected video/audio stream through the proxy.
YouTubeDownloader.flowStep3: Merge and export the file in your browser using FFmpeg.
YouTubeDownloader.limitationsDesc: Downloads can be slow because streams are fetched through a proxy and processed locally in your browser. Large videos may take several minutes.
